title: raw_77_ribozyme_design_v1 — ribozyme output schema (R-R1)
description: R-R1 ribozyme design-stage output contract. Lands draft from .roadmap.ribozyme §STALLED R-R1 (UNDEFINED 2D/3D). Fields: sequence + 2D structure (dot-bracket MFE, optional pending Nussinov/Zuker port) + predicted k_cat/K_M (Eigen-Hammes margin) + 4-state reaction ladder. 3D pose is stub-allowed for v1 (full pose under cycle-26 stretch). Schema co-versions with row schema raw_77_ribozyme_kinetics_v1 (cycle 24 MVP) — design rows extend kinetics rows with structure_2d + structure_3d_ref blocks.

full.description: Full ribozyme RNA sequence (5' to 3', RNA alphabet ACGU).

reference.description: Canonical reference (e.g. Symons 1981 NAR 9:6527 hammerhead minimal HHR).

structure_2d.description: Secondary-structure prediction. Inline Nussinov MFE solver landed 2026-05-12 (`_python_bridge/module/ribozyme_mfe_nussinov.py`, stdlib-only) → `dot_bracket = 'stub'` allowance is DEPRECATED for new rows (kept in enum for backward-compat with pre-2026-05-12 rows). New rows MUST use `nussinov_inline` (pair-maximization, no ΔG) or `turner_nn_subset` (cycle-24 partition surrogate, ΔG kcal/mol).

dot_bracket.description: Vienna dot-bracket notation matching sequence.full length. Literal 'stub' is DEPRECATED post-2026-05-12 (Nussinov port landed); preserved in pre-existing rows only.

method.description: Solver. nussinov_inline = stdlib pair-maximization (ribozyme_mfe_nussinov.py, 2026-05-12). turner_nn_subset = cycle-24 MVP partition surrogate (ΔG path). zuker_inline / viennaRNA_external reserved for future ports. stub = DEPRECATED, kept for pre-2026-05-12 rows only.

delta_g_kcal_per_mol.description: MFE / partition-surrogate ΔG in kcal/mol; null if method ∈ {nussinov_inline, stub} (Nussinov is pair-counting, not thermodynamic).

structure_3d_ref.description: Tertiary pose reference. v1 ALLOWS stub; full pose deferred to cycle-26 stretch (R-R1 option A).

active_site_geometry.description: Active-site geometry tag (Symons 1981 / Wu-Lai 1989 / Buzayan 1986 canonical poses; stub allowed).

ts_pose_group_order.description: J₂=24 trigonal-bipyramidal TS pose-equivalence orbit order (master identity).

predicted_kinetics.description: Predicted catalytic rate constants. Eigen-Hammes margin = log10(1e9 / k_cat_K_M_M_inv_s_inv) ≥ 0.

k_cat_K_M_M_inv_s_inv.description: Catalytic efficiency; bounded by Eigen-Hammes diffusion ceiling 1e9 M⁻¹s⁻¹.

reaction_ladder.description: 4-state reaction ladder (τ(6)=4). States: S1_substrate_bound → S2_transition_state → S3_cleaved → S4_product_released.

binary_outcome.description: φ(6)=2 binary outcome at terminal state.

J2.description: Master identity sigma*phi = 6*tau = J2 = 24; trigonal-bipyramidal TS pose-equivalence.

off_target_screen.description: Host-transcriptome substrate-arm specificity screen (C2 cell DoD component 3). v1 allows stub; tracked under cycle-26 uplift.

method.description: Screening method. hamming_seed = stdlib-only; mirrors WEAVE Π^p_2 verifier v2 pattern.

disease_target.description: C2 16-cell matrix routing (R·α / R·β / R·γ / R·δ).

target_mrna.description: e.g. FLT3-ITD, NPM1c, β-globin precursor, conserved viral region, IL-6.
